title: Formation Features of Steps and Branches of an Upward Negative Leader
author: Haitao Huang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Attached are frames of a high speed video that support the manuscript entitled “Formation Features of Steps and Branches of an Upward Negative Leader ”. The data can be used freely for scientific purposes with appropriate citation.
